title: Setting up two-factor authentication for security
content: Two-factor authentication (2FA) adds an extra layer of security by requiring a one-time code in addition to your password. To enable it, go to Security settings, select Two-Factor Authentication, and follow the prompts to link an authenticator app or your phone number. Be sure to save your backup codes in a safe place in case you lose access to your device. Once enabled, you will be asked for a code each time you sign in from a new device.
